name: io.github.nirholas/hood-mcp
description: Robinhood Chain data + guarded trading for AI agents: Stock Token quotes, portfolios, launches

environmentVariables.name: ALCHEMY_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional Alchemy API key for a faster, private RPC instead of the public endpoint.

tradingServer.note: A second, explicitly opt-in wallet server ships in the same package as bin `hood-mcp-trading`. It is NOT auto-installed by MCP clients and requires HOOD_MCP_ENABLE_TRADING=1 plus ROBINHOOD_CHAIN_PRIVATE_KEY. See README.md#trading-server.
